title: Exercises Menu
lead: This is the exercises hub template. Add your course exercises here.

about.title: About this template
about.text:
Use this page as a central menu for exercises.

Students can access different types of activities from here.

tip.title: To add exercises
tip.text:
1. Copy the template from template-system/core/templates/exercises/
2. Paste in paginas/pt/
3. Add in content.json in the extras section
